data.content:
Implementation complete. Branch: feature/knots-a08a-fix-empty-query-pagination

Fix: text-query and other in-memory filters now run before pagination so
empty-match pages report total: 0 and has_more: false. The previous
SQL-side pagination path (list_knot_hot_paginated) was removed because
it counted unfiltered rows.

Verified from /Users/cartine/foolery:
- kno ls -q escalation --all --json --limit 50 → data: [], total: 0, has_more: false
- kno ls -q approval --all --json --limit 50 → data: [], total: 0, has_more: false
- kno ls --all --json --limit 5 → data has 5 entries, total: 23, has_more: true (multi-page totals preserved)

Regression tests live in src/pagination.rs:
- empty_match_set_reports_zero_total_and_no_more
- multi_page_match_set_preserves_totals_and_has_more

make sanity passes (1113 tests, 95.11% coverage).
